name: Fusemachines Inc.
summary: Fusemachines Inc. is a provider of enterprise AI solutions offering AI products including AI Studio (a platform for building, deploying, and managing AI applications), AI Engines (specialized AI software for targeted business challenges), and AI Agents (intelligent systems automating complex workflows). The company also provides implementation services through Forward Deployed Engineers and runs AI training programs including an AI Fellowship Program across the United States, Nepal, and the Dominican Republic.

products.name: AI Studio
products.description: Foundational platform enabling organizations to build, deploy, and manage AI applications at scale across Business, AI Hub, Data, and Governance layers.

products.name: AI Engines
products.description: Specialized AI software built on AI Studio targeting industry- and pain point-specific outcomes using LLMs, computer vision, machine learning, and deep learning.

products.name: AI Agents
products.description: Intelligent systems built on AI Engines and AI Studio that automate complex workflows such as recruitment interview assistance and candidate evaluation.

products.name: Squadery
products.description: Internal platform centralizing operational data from CRM and HR systems to support project management, resource allocation, and delivery coordination.
